audio_clips.text: A position a square, yellow piece of origami paper flat on the table. The paper is rotated 45 degrees into a diamond shape
Fold the paper in half diagonally, bringing the bottom corner to meet the top corner, creating a triangle and forming a center crease.
Gently press the fold to crease it.
A finger points to the bottom-right corner of the triangle.
The bottom-right corner of the triangle is folded upwards towards the top point, beginning the formation of a smaller triangle.
Gently press the fold to crease it..
Unfold the triangle to reveal the bigger triangle.
Hands fold the top right corner of a triangle to its center crease, forming a smaller triangle.  They repeat on the left. The top flap is folded upwards two-thirds of the way and creased.

Triangular dog ears are form. Flip the paper over. Fold down the top point creating a horizontal crease slightly below the top edge. Fold down the bottom point slighly below the bottom edge, resulting in a pentagon shape
On folded paper, a marker draws two dots for eyes, and a curved line makes a smiling dog face.
Add marker details to a completed 6-inch origami dog face, then lift it to show off.

THANKS YOU FOR WATCHING THE VIDEO.
SUBSCRIBE TO SEE MORE VIDEOS AT : http://www.youtube.com/BeingAKidAgain

video_name: How to make an origami dog face step by step.
